title: Automation for update checkbox completion
excerpt:
Completed checkboxes within an item are tracked so we can visually see how many items are marked complete. 
I would like the option to make an automation for when all the checkboxes are “done” within an items update, …

posts.author: katelynprice (Katelyn Price)
posts.cookedHtml:
Screen Shot 2022-06-16 at 6.31.26 PM724×66 13.7 KB

Completed checkboxes within an item are tracked so we can visually see how many items are marked complete.

I would like the option to make an automation for when all the checkboxes are “done” within an items update, change the item status to “Done”.
